violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (beverages) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 200 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. PIC increased sanitizer concentration during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
